title: The People vs. Dr. Kildare
writer: Lawrence P. Bachmann, Max Brand, Willis Goldbeck
actors: Lew Ayres, Lionel Barrymore, Laraine Day
plot: Kildare saves the life of an ice skater who was in an auto accident. But even though her broken leg has knit, she can't walk, and she tries to sue Kildare for malpractice, and Kildare's entire career and reputation now rests on ma...
